title: crotalaria campestris
intro: Crotalaria campestris, also known as the Field Rattle Box or Rattle Bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Crotalaria campestris include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and can be used to treat a range of ailments, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
